headline: Equinix (EQIX) Just Flashed Golden Cross Signal: Do You Buy?
summary: When a stock breaks out above the 20-day simple moving average, good things could be on the horizon. How should investors react?

headline: Mizuho Maintains Outperform on Equinix, Raises Price Target to $1200
summary: Mizuho  analyst Vikram Malhotra   maintains Equinix (NASDAQ:EQIX) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $1165 to $1200.
